name: Store Data
description: Store data to a collection in the database.
doc:
Save data to a SQLite collection.

Features:
• Each flow has its own isolated database
• Collections are created automatically
• Data stored as JSON documents
• Auto-generated unique IDs

Usage:
• Connect any data (object, string, number, etc.)
• Specify collection name to organize data
• Output includes the stored record with ID

Tip: Use different collection names to organize different types of data within your flow.

properties.name: Collection
properties.description: Collection/table name to store data in
